title: Simple Bridge Overlay
description: Changes the appearance of clay in the Game The Bridge and makes the game more classic
body:
![Simple Bridge Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/302d6250c17d414f0e2f76f651291eda4ab382ab.png)**Simple Bridge Overlay** is a clean resource pack for Minecraft 1.8.9 made mainly for Bridge PvP players who want better visibility while bridging and fighting. It changes the block overlay to make placements easier to see and helps keep your screen looking clean during fast gameplay.

The pack is designed to stay simple and lightweight without adding unnecessary changes, so you can use it for Bridge, Bedwars, or any other PvP mode where clear visibility matters. It keeps the normal Minecraft feel while making the overlay more practical for competitive play.

This is only a visual texture/overlay pack and is not a cheat or mod. It does not give unfair advantages, automate anything, or change gameplay mechanics in any way. It simply improves how the overlay looks so bridging feels cleaner and easier to track.

## Features
-  Improved block placement visibility
-  Clean and minimal overlay design![Simple Bridge Overlay]
-  Lightweight with no unnecessary changes
-  Made for Bridge PvP and Bedwars
-  Compatible with Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP clients

> If you want a minimal overlay pack focused on visibility and PvP without extra clutter, this pack is made for that.
